title: Chappell Roan — Summer Sessions Edinburgh
review: I love Chappell, but this was laclustre. I kind of just felt like she didn't want to be there.
full_description: Two sold-out shows at Edinburgh's Royal Highland Showground, around 60,000 fans across both nights. Chappell performed all 14 tracks from The Rise and Fall of a Midwest Princess, bursting onto the stage in a jester outfit. Supported by Little Mix's JADE and local Scottish drag queens.
ai_summary: Chappell Roan's sold-out Edinburgh Summer Sessions shows — 30,000 fans per night at the Royal Highland Showground, performing her full debut album The Rise and Fall of a Midwest Princess with a characteristically theatrical, glitter-drenched opening.

extension.tour_name: Visions of Damsels & Other Dangerous Things
